name: Medium Ambush
description: Asymmetric confrontation — one side emerging, the other caught.
hld_patterns: {setting}. A figure emerging from shadow, another caught mid-turn.
{setting}. An asymmetric encounter — one looming, one reacting.
{setting}. A sudden confrontation, figures at uneven distance.

2: {subject}, background, turned toward the first, smaller in frame.
4: {subject}, foreground, largest in frame, facing forward.
{subject}, far background, smallest, facing the foreground figure.

background_pool: A dark doorway framed by crumbling brick, light spilling through in a sharp diagonal from an unseen source, debris scattered on the floor, deep shadow swallowing the background
A dense forest edge, trees pressing close, dappled moonlight cutting through the canopy, ferns and undergrowth in the foreground, the space behind vanishing into black
A parking garage interior, concrete pillars creating blind spots, a single sodium lamp buzzing overhead, oil stains on the floor reflecting weak light, the far levels disappearing into gloom
The mouth of an alley, the figures caught between the dark passage behind and the lit street ahead, dumpsters and fire escapes crowding the frame, rain-slicked pavement catching the glow
action_pool: pressing flat against the nearest surface
reaching out to shove the other back
